Description: Implement user authentication (email/password, Google OAuth), multi-company support, onboarding wizard, team invitations, and company switching.
As a new user, I want to sign up with my email and password so that I can create an account and access the platform.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can enter email and password on /auth page
- Validation prevents weak passwords and invalid email formats
- Successful sign-up creates auth.users and profiles records
- User is redirected to onboarding wizard
- Duplicate email shows appropriate error message

Description: As a user, I want to sign in with my Google account so that I can access the platform without managing another password.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Google sign-in button is visible on /auth page
- Clicking initiates Google OAuth consent flow
- Successful auth creates or links account
- User is redirected to dashboard (existing company) or onboarding (new user)
- OAuth errors display user-friendly messages

Description: As a new user, I want to create my company workspace so that I can start managing my clients and documents.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Onboarding wizard has 3 steps: niche selection, company name, user profile
- Niche options: Migration, Audit, HR
- Company record created with selected niche
- User added as owner in company_members
- Profile display name saved
- Redirect to niche-specific dashboard on completion

Description: As a multi-company user, I want to switch between my companies so that I can manage different workspaces.
Acceptance Criteria:
- CompanySwitcher dropdown visible in sidebar when user belongs to 2+ companies
- Selecting a company changes the active context
- All data reloads for the selected company
- Current company name displayed in switcher

Description: As a company owner or admin, I want to invite team members by email so that they can join my workspace.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Invitation form accepts email and role (admin, member, guest)
- Invitation record created in team_invitations with status 'pending'
- Only owners and admins can send invitations
- Duplicate email for same company shows error
- Pending invitations visible in team members list

Description: As an invited user, I want to automatically join a company when I log in so that I don't need a separate acceptance flow.
Acceptance Criteria:
- On login, system checks team_invitations for matching email
- Matching pending invitation auto-creates company_members record
- Invitation status updated to 'accepted'
- User can access the company immediately

Description: As a system, I want to prevent unauthenticated users from accessing protected pages so that data remains secure.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Unauthenticated users redirected to /auth
- Auth state checked before rendering protected routes
- Loading state shown during auth check
- Deep links preserved after authentication

Description: Manage client records including personal and corporate types, with CRUD operations, related applicants, and Google Drive folder status tracking.
As a team member, I want to see all my company's clients in a list so that I can find and manage them.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Client list shows name, type, email, folder status
- Search filters clients by name or email
- List loads only clients for active company
- Empty state shown when no clients exist

Description: As a team member, I want to create a personal client record so that I can manage their visa application documents.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Form collects: first name, last name, email, phone, nationality, passport number, date of birth
- Client type set to 'personal'
- Company_id auto-set to active company
- Automation event triggered for folder creation
- Client appears in list after creation

Description: As a team member, I want to create a corporate client record so that I can manage a business entity's applications.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Form collects: company name, email, phone
- Client type set to 'corporate'
- First/last name fields hidden for corporate type
- Company_id auto-set to active company
- Automation event triggered for folder creation

Description: As a team member, I want to view a client's full profile and their applications so that I can manage their case.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Detail page shows all client fields
- Associated visa applications listed
- Related applicants section visible
- Folder status indicator shown
- Edit and delete actions available based on role

Description: As a team member, I want to update a client's details so that their record stays current.
Acceptance Criteria:
- All client fields are editable
- Changes saved to database on submit
- Success toast shown after save
- Validation prevents empty required fields

Description: As an owner or admin, I want to delete a client so that I can remove incorrect or duplicate records.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Delete requires confirmation dialog
- Only owners and admins see delete option
- Client and associated data removed
- User redirected to client list after deletion

Description: As a team member, I want to link clients as related applicants so that I can track family groups.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Add related applicant dialog allows selecting existing clients
- Relationship type selectable (spouse, child, etc.)
- Related applicants displayed on client detail page
- Related applicants stored in client.related_applicants JSON field

Description: As a team member, I want to see the real-time status of folder creation so that I know when Drive folders are ready.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Folder status badge shows: not_started, pending, created, error
- Status updates in real-time via Supabase Realtime
- Error state is visually distinct
- Created state shows folder is ready for document uploads

Description: Manage visa/migration applications with lifecycle status tracking, category selection, applicant assignment, and document checklists.
As a team member, I want to see all applications so that I can track their status and progress.
Acceptance Criteria:
- List shows application name, client, status, category
- Filterable by status (draft, active, done)
- Searchable by name
- Only shows applications for active company

Description: As a team member, I want to create a new visa application for a client so that I can manage their case documents.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Form requires: application name, client selection
- Optional: country, category, subcategory
- Categories filter by selected country
- Subcategories filter by selected category
- Status defaults to 'draft'
- Document checklist auto-generated from templates

Description: As a team member, I want to view full application details including documents and applicants so that I can manage the case.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Shows application metadata (name, status, category, subclass)
- Document checklist with upload/review capabilities
- Applicants section with add/remove
- Folder status indicator
- Client portal invitation action

Description: As a team member, I want to change an application's status so that I can track its lifecycle.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Status options: Draft, Active, Done
- Status changeable via dropdown/select
- No transition validation rules enforced
- Status change saved immediately

Description: As a team member, I want to add applicants to an application so that each person's documents are tracked separately.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Add applicant dialog with client and type selection
- Applicant types from reference data (primary, spouse, child, etc.)
- Primary applicant auto-assigned on creation
- Sort order maintained
- Remove applicant with confirmation

Description: As a team member, I want to select visa categories hierarchically so that the correct document templates are applied.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Country selection filters available categories
- Category selection filters available subcategories
- Selections stored on visa_applications record
- Document templates may change based on category

Description: Upload, review, and manage documents within application checklists including multi-file attachments, review workflows, translation requirements, and document history.
As a team member, I want to see the document checklist for an application so that I know which documents are needed.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Checklist auto-generated from templates on application creation
- Shows document name, description, requirement type (required/conditional/optional)
- Completion status indicator per item
- Review status badge (pending_client, in_review, approved, rejected)
- Category grouping for documents

Description: As a team member, I want to upload documents to a checklist item so that the client's file is stored securely.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Upload to Supabase Storage
- If Drive connected, also upload to Google Drive
- Multiple files supported per checklist item (up to max_files)
- File metadata (name, size, type) recorded
- Upload progress indicator shown
- Checklist item marked as completed after upload

Description: As a team member, I want to approve or reject uploaded documents so that the client knows if resubmission is needed.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Review status: pending_client → in_review → approved/rejected
- Approve action sets status to 'approved'
- Reject action requires a review comment
- Reject sets status to 'rejected'
- Review timestamp and reviewer recorded

Description: As a team member, I want to attach multiple files to a single checklist item so that composite documents are handled correctly.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Multiple files uploadable per checklist item
- Each attachment tracked in document_attachments
- Min/max file constraints from template (min_files, max_files)
- Individual attachment removal supported
- Completion status based on min_files threshold

Description: As a team member, I want to see the history of replaced documents so that I can track what was previously submitted.
Acceptance Criteria:
- When attachment replaced, old version archived to document_attachment_history
- History shows: file name, upload date, review status at time of archive, archive reason
- History viewable per checklist item
- Archived files retain their metadata

Description: As an admin, I want to configure document checklist templates so that applications auto-generate the correct checklists.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Templates configurable per visa type and applicant type
- Template fields: document name, description, requirement type, category
- Translation requirements configurable per template
- Applicability conditions (age-based, etc.) supported
- Templates linked to visa types via document_template_applications

Description: As a team member, I want to mark documents requiring translation so that the client knows which documents need certified translations.
Acceptance Criteria:
- requires_translation flag on checklist items
- Translation target language selectable
- Translation certification type selectable (NAATI, sworn, etc.)
- Translation notes field for special instructions
- Translation-of reference links translation to original document

Description: As a team member, I want to preview uploaded documents so that I can review them without downloading.
Acceptance Criteria:
- PDF thumbnail generation
- Preview dialog with full document view
- Support for common document types
- Fallback for unsupported types

Description: Provide external clients with token-based access to upload documents, fill forms, and submit completed packages without requiring authentication.
As a team member, I want to generate a client portal link so that my client can upload their documents remotely.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Generate portal access from application detail
- Set token expiration date
- Enter client email
- Unique access token generated
- Portal link displayed for sharing (manual copy)
- Record created in client_portal_access

Description: As an external client, I want to access my document portal via a link so that I can upload required documents without creating an account.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Portal accessible via URL with token parameter
- Token validated against client_portal_access
- Expired tokens show expiry message
- Submitted portals show read-only view
- Last accessed timestamp updated on each visit

Description: As an external client, I want to upload documents through the portal so that my agent receives the files they need.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Document checklist displayed with descriptions
- Upload button per checklist item
- Files uploaded via client-portal-upload edge function
- Review status set to pending_client after upload
- Upload confirmation shown

Description: As an external client, I want to remove a document I uploaded so that I can replace it with a correct version.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Remove button on uploaded documents
- Confirmation dialog before removal
- File removed from Storage and Drive
- If all attachments removed, is_completed reset to false
- Review status reset to in_review

Description: As an external client, I want to fill in my personal information so that my agent has the details they need.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Form fields displayed in portal
- Data saved to client_form_data table
- Auto-save or explicit save
- Form data linked to client, application, and company

Description: As an external client, I want to submit my completed portal so that my agent knows I'm done uploading.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Submit button available when documents are uploaded
- Submission is one-time and irreversible
- is_submitted set to true, submitted_at recorded
- Portal becomes read-only after submission
- Notification sent to company members

Description: Connect company Google Drive accounts via OAuth, manage folder structure, sync uploaded documents, and track folder creation status.
As an owner or admin, I want to connect my company's Google Drive so that client documents are automatically stored there.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Connect button in Settings → Google Drive
- Initiates OAuth 2.0 flow via google-drive-auth edge function
- Callback handles token exchange and storage
- Tokens encrypted before database storage
- Connected email displayed after success

Description: As an owner or admin, I want to select a root folder in Drive so that all client folders are created under it.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Folder browser dialog after connection
- Navigate Drive folder hierarchy
- Select folder and confirm
- Root folder ID and name stored on connection
- Drive folder structure created under this root

Description: As a system, I want to auto-create client folders in Drive so that documents have an organized storage structure.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Client creation triggers automation event
- Webhook dispatches to Make.com
- Make.com creates folder in Drive: {Root}/{Client Name}/
- Callback updates client.client_folder_id and folder_status
- Documents Received subfolder created if setting enabled
- 30-second timeout marks folder as error if no callback

Description: As a system, I want to auto-create application folders in Drive so that each case has its own document storage.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Application creation triggers automation event
- Webhook dispatches to Make.com
- Make.com creates folder in Drive: {Root}/{Client}/{Application}/
- Callback updates visa_applications.visa_application_folder_id
- Folder created as subfolder of client folder

Description: As a system, I want to upload documents to both Storage and Drive so that files are accessible from Drive.
Acceptance Criteria:
- File uploaded to Supabase Storage first
- If Drive connected, internal-upload edge function copies to Drive
- File placed in correct application folder
- Drive file ID not stored (uses folder structure)
- If Drive upload fails, Storage copy is retained

Description: As an owner or admin, I want to disconnect Google Drive so that I can switch accounts or stop syncing.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Disconnect button in Settings → Google Drive
- Confirmation dialog required
- Tokens revoked and connection record deleted
- Existing files in Drive remain untouched
- New uploads go to Storage only

Description: As a team member, I want to see folder creation status update in real-time so that I know when folders are ready.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Supabase Realtime subscription on folder_status columns
- Status badge updates without page refresh
- States: not_started → pending → created / error
- useFolderStatusRealtime hook handles subscriptions

Description: Configure platform-level webhooks for event dispatching with payload customization, HMAC signing, retry logic, rate limiting, and monitoring.
As a platform admin, I want to create webhook endpoints so that external systems receive event notifications.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Create webhook with: name, URL, selected events, included fields
- Configure timeout (seconds), max retries, retry backoff
- Optional secret key for HMAC signing
- Enable/disable toggle
- Webhook saved to platform_webhooks

Description: As a platform admin, I want to choose which events trigger a webhook so that endpoints only receive relevant data.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Event types: client.created/updated/deleted, application.created/updated/deleted
- Multi-select for events per webhook
- Events grouped by entity (Client, Application)
- At least one event required per webhook

Description: As a platform admin, I want to select which fields are included in webhook payloads so that only necessary data is transmitted.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Field selection per entity category (client, visa_application)
- Each field has label and description
- Default fields pre-selected
- Selected fields stored in included_fields array

Description: As a platform admin, I want to sign webhook payloads with a secret key so that receivers can verify authenticity.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Optional secret key per webhook
- HMAC-SHA256 signature included in request headers
- Secret key stored securely
- Timing-safe comparison utility available for verification

Description: As a platform admin, I want to configure retry behavior so that transient failures are handled automatically.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Max retries configurable (default 3)
- Retry backoff in seconds (exponential)
- Timeout per request configurable
- Failed deliveries retried automatically

Description: As a platform admin, I want to monitor webhook delivery status so that I can identify and troubleshoot failures.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Request log showing: endpoint, status code, duration, timestamp
- Success/failure counts
- Rate-limited request tracking
- Hourly stats aggregation via get_webhook_hourly_stats()
- Error messages displayed for failed requests

Description: As a system, I want to rate-limit webhook consumers so that the platform is protected from abuse.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Per-endpoint rate limiting via check_rate_limit() function
- Configurable max requests and window size
- Rate limit records in webhook_rate_limits table
- Periodic cleanup via cleanup-rate-limits edge function
- Rate-limited requests logged with rate_limited flag

Description: Provide super-admin capabilities including company management, user management, impersonation, audit logging, platform settings, and reference data management.
As a platform admin, I want to see platform-wide metrics so that I can monitor system health and usage.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Overview of total companies, users, applications
- Accessible only to platform_admins
- Separate admin layout with dedicated navigation
- Dashboard at /admin route

Description: As a platform admin, I want to view and manage all companies so that I can provide support and oversight.
Acceptance Criteria:
- List all companies with name, niche, plan, member count
- View company detail with members and settings
- Edit company properties
- Navigate to company detail page

Description: As a platform admin, I want to view and manage all users so that I can handle account issues.
Acceptance Criteria:
- List all user profiles
- View user details and company memberships
- Delete user action via admin-delete-user edge function
- User deletion removes auth.users record

Description: As a super admin, I want to act as another user so that I can debug issues they report.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Impersonate action generates temporary auth token
- ImpersonationBanner displayed during session
- Admin can end impersonation and return to admin account
- Only super_admin role can impersonate
- Audit log entry created for impersonation

Description: As a platform admin, I want to review audit logs so that I can track administrative actions.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Audit logs list: action, entity type, entity ID, timestamp, user
- Details column with JSON payload
- IP address recorded where available
- Filterable by action type and date range

Description: As a platform admin, I want to manage platform-level settings so that I can configure system behavior.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Key-value settings store
- Secret flag for sensitive values
- Settings editable by platform admins
- Updated_by and updated_at tracking

Description: As a platform admin, I want to manage reference data so that the system has current visa types, countries, and categories.
Acceptance Criteria:
- CRUD for: countries, languages, applicant types, categories, subcategories, visa types, translation cert types
- Category-applicant type rules configuration
- Sort order and active/inactive toggle
- Reference data used across all companies

Description: As a platform admin, I want to review user feedback so that I can prioritize improvements.
Acceptance Criteria:
- List all feedback submissions
- Filter by type (bug, feature request, general) and status
- Admin notes field for internal comments
- Status tracking for feedback resolution

Description: Display subscription plan information and billing status. Stripe integration schema exists but payment processing is not implemented.
As an owner or admin, I want to view my company's billing information so that I can manage my subscription.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Display current subscription plan
- Show Stripe customer ID if linked
- Billing page accessible from main navigation
- Only owners and admins can access
- NOTE: No actual payment processing or plan changes available

Description: As a platform admin, I want to see billing status across all companies so that I can track revenue.
Acceptance Criteria:
- List companies with their subscription plans
- Show subscription status
- Platform-level billing metrics
- NOTE: Display only; no payment processing

Description: Deliver in-app notifications for key events with real-time updates, read tracking, and notification bell UI.
As a user, I want to see a notification indicator so that I know when something requires my attention.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Bell icon in app header
- Unread count badge displayed
- Click opens notification dropdown/panel
- Notifications specific to user and active company

Description: As a user, I want to receive notifications in real-time so that I'm immediately aware of new events.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Supabase Realtime subscription on notifications table
- New notifications appear without page refresh
- Notification types: client_portal_submitted, document_uploaded, etc.
- Each notification has title, message, and metadata

Description: As a user, I want to mark notifications as read so that I can track what I've already reviewed.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Individual mark-as-read action
- Bulk mark-all-as-read action
- Read timestamp recorded
- Read notifications visually distinguished from unread

Description: Allow users to submit bug reports, feature requests, and general feedback via an in-app widget.
As a user, I want to submit feedback from any page so that I can report issues or suggest features.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Floating feedback button visible on all authenticated pages
- Feedback dialog with: title, description, type selector
- Types: bug report, feature request, general feedback
- User agent and current page auto-captured
- Submission saved to beta_feedback table

Description: As a platform admin, I want to track feedback resolution so that submissions are addressed.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Status field on feedback records
- Admin notes for internal discussion
- Status visible in admin feedback list
- Updated_at timestamp on status changes

Description: Support multiple languages (EN, ES, PT) with UI translation, database entity translations, and per-company language preferences.
As a user, I want to switch the interface language so that I can use the app in my preferred language.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Language switcher in app header/sidebar
- Supported languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese
- Selection persisted across sessions
- UI immediately updates on language change

Description: As a user, I want all UI text in my selected language so that I can navigate without language barriers.
Acceptance Criteria:
- All UI strings externalized to translation files
- Translation files: public/locales/{lang}/translation.json
- i18next framework with browser language detection
- HTTP backend for lazy loading translations

Description: As an owner, I want to set a default language for my company so that new members see the right language.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Preferred language setting on company record
- Used as fallback when user has no preference
- Configurable in company settings
- Stored in companies.preferred_language

Description: Implement search engine optimization with meta tags, sitemaps, and static legal pages.
As a system, I want to set appropriate meta tags per page so that search engines index the site correctly.
Acceptance Criteria:
- SEO component sets title, description, OG tags per page
- Title under 60 characters with main keyword
- Meta description under 160 characters
- noIndex flag for authenticated pages
- react-helmet-async for head management

Description: As a system, I want to provide sitemap.xml and robots.txt so that search crawlers discover pages efficiently.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Static sitemap.xml in public directory
- robots.txt with crawl directives
- Google Search Console verification file present

Description: As a visitor, I want to read privacy policy and terms of service so that I understand the platform's legal terms.
Acceptance Criteria:
- /privacy route with Privacy Policy content
- /terms route with Terms of Service content
- Pages accessible without authentication
- Linked from footer/auth pages
